ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_class" TEXT /* Classification of the region */,
  "region_area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "region_depth" REAL /* Average depth of the region in meters */,
  "region_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature of the region in degrees Celsius */,
  "region_salinity" REAL /* Average salinity of the region in parts per thousand (ppt) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fish_tracking_data" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tracking process */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region being monitored */,
  "height_mean" REAL /* Mean height of tracked fish */,
  "ping_s" INTEGER /* Start ping value */,
  "ping_e" INTEGER /* End ping value */,
  "dist_m" REAL /* Distance in meters */,
  "date_m" TEXT /* Date of measurement */,
  "time_m" TEXT /* Time of measurement */,
  "lat_m" REAL /* Latitude of measurement */,
  "lon_m" REAL /* Longitude of measurement */,
  "std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of measurements */,
  "num_targets" INTEGER /* Number of targets being tracked */,
  "fish_species" TEXT /* Species of the fish */,
  "fish_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each fish */,
  "environmental_condition" TEXT /* Description of the environmental conditions */,
  "tracking_method" TEXT /* Method used for tracking */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who conducted the tracking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fish_tracking_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fish_metrics" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tracking process */,
  "ts_mean" REAL /* Mean timestamp value */,
  "target_range_mean" REAL /* Mean range of targets */,
  "speed_4d_mean_unsmoothed" REAL /* Mean speed calculated over 4D */,
  "fish_track_change_in_range" REAL /* Change in fish track within range */,
  "time_in_beam" REAL /* Time spent in the beam */,
  "fish_species" TEXT /* Species of the fish */,
  "fish_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each fish */,
  "environmental_condition" TEXT /* Description of the environmental conditions */,
  "tracking_method" TEXT /* Method used for tracking */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who conducted the tracking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "depth_data" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tracking process */,
  "thickness_mean" REAL /* Mean thickness of tracked fish */,
  "exclude_below_line_range_mean" REAL /* Mean exclusion below line range */,
  "target_depth_mean" REAL /* Mean target depth */,
  "target_depth_max" REAL /* Maximum target depth */,
  "target_depth_min" REAL /* Minimum target depth */,
  "fish_species" TEXT /* Species of the fish */,
  "fish_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each fish */,
  "environmental_condition" TEXT /* Description of the environmental conditions */,
  "tracking_method" TEXT /* Method used for tracking */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who conducted the tracking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "altitude_data" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the monitored region */,
  "region_bottom_altitude_min" REAL /* Minimum bottom altitude in the region */,
  "region_bottom_altitude_max" REAL /* Maximum bottom altitude in the region */,
  "region_bottom_altitude_mean" REAL /* Mean bottom altitude in the region */,
  "region_top_altitude_min" REAL /* Minimum top altitude in the region */,
  "region_top_altitude_max" REAL /* Maximum top altitude in the region */,
  "region_top_altitude_mean" REAL /* Mean top altitude in the region */,
  "region_area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "region_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature of the region in degrees Celsius */,
  "region_salinity" REAL /* Average salinity of the region in parts per thousand (ppt) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the project */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Researcher's area of specialization */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Researcher's contact number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Researcher's address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracking_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tracking process being accessed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracking_access_logs_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES fish_tracking_data ("process_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracking_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
